title: Toyota Proace City
body:

![Toyota Proace City](../images/day-exterior-33_EPR_CMFY-Background-Removed-100x100.png)

![Toyota Proace City](../images/day-exterior-9_EPR_CMFY-Background-Removed-100x100.png)

Toyota Proace City Lease The Toyota Proace City delivers remarkable capabilities in a compact package. This versatile van offers up to 3.9 cubic metres of load space with payload capacity…

city hitting 950 kg. These numbers make a strong case if you’re thinking about a toyota proace lease for city deliveries or trade work.  
The Proace City’s diesel engines achieve over 50 mpg, while its electric version runs for 161 miles on a single charge. Our tests show it adapts well to business needs of all types. You can choose between two body sizes, three trim levels, and multiple powertrains to match your toyota proace van lease deals with your exact needs. On top of that, it comes packed with features like a 10-inch display, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto – much more than a simple work van.

Let’s get into the actual costs and benefits of toyota proace lease deals to help you make a smart business choice in 2025.

## Toyota Proace City Lease Options Explained

A toyota proace lease gives you several configuration options that help find the perfect match for your business needs. The Proace City has different body sizes, trim levels, and powertrain options that affect both capability and leasing costs.

### Short vs Long Wheelbase: What You Get

The Proace City comes in two body lengths – a short wheelbase (L1) at 4.4m and a long wheelbase (L2) at 4.7m. These size differences create meaningful capacity variations. The short model gives you 3.3-3.8 cubic metres of load space. The long version offers an impressive 3.9-4.4 cubic metres. The Smart Cargo system, standard on all 2024 models, extends load length to 3.1m for short wheelbase and 3.4m for long wheelbase variants.

Each model’s payload capacity is different. The short wheelbase diesel carries up to 990kg, while the long version handles up to 950kg. Both sizes fit two Euro pallets – a feature you won’t find in all compact vans.

### Active, Icon, and Sport Trims Compared

Toyota proace van lease deals vary based on trim levels that affect price and equipment. The entry-level Active grade, available only in short wheelbase, has air conditioning, Bluetooth, twin sliding side doors, and rear parking sensors. All 2024 models come with a 10-inch multimedia touchscreen and digital driver’s instrument cluster.

The Icon grade, available in both lengths, adds navigation, front fog lights, rain-sensing wipers, power-folding mirrors, front parking sensors, and a reversing camera. The Sport trim tops the range with body-coloured bumpers, door handles, side mouldings, and 16-inch alloy wheels rather than extra utility features.

### Diesel vs Electric: Key Lease Differences

Your biggest toyota proace lease decision comes down to choosing between diesel and electric powertrains. The diesel lineup has a 1.5-litre engine with either 101hp (paired with manual transmission) or 129hp (available with manual or eight-speed automatic).

The electric model uses a 100kW motor that produces 136hp with 260Nm of torque. It offers lower running costs and zero road tax until 2025, but carries less cargo – 759kg maximum payload compared to the diesel’s 1,000kg capacity. The price structure is different too, with the electric version starting at £23,057.50 (excluding VAT).

The electric model’s toyota proace city lease costs might look higher initially, but it qualifies for a £2,500 OZEV grant and saves money on running costs.

## Hidden Costs in Toyota Proace Van Leasing

The monthly figures you see advertised for a Toyota Proace lease don’t tell the whole story. Your total costs will be higher due to several hidden expenses. Let’s learn about these extra charges to help you budget better and avoid surprises.

### Initial Rental and Processing Fees

Your Toyota Proace van lease starts with some big upfront payments. The initial rentals range from £2,539+VAT to £5,122.92+VAT. This amount depends on your lease provider and terms. You’ll pay multiple months of your regular rental fee in advance.

Processing fees add another layer of expense that people often miss. These administrative charges vary between leasing companies – from £250+VAT to £300+VAT. While companies like Vanarama advertise “no arrangement fees”, this isn’t standard practise. Always check this cost before you sign anything.

### Excess Mileage Charges and Penalties

Toyota Proace lease deals come with strict mileage limits that start at 5,000 miles per year. Going over your agreed mileage allowance costs between 10.5p per mile and 15p per mile plus VAT. Your business mileage needs careful planning to avoid these hefty charges.

Breaking your Toyota Proace City lease agreement early hits hard financially. The penalty fees “could be more than 50% of all remaining payments”. Take time to think over your long-term vehicle needs before you commit.

### Maintenance and Wear-and-Tear Clauses

Optional maintenance packages cost extra with Toyota Proace lease deals. Without this coverage, you’ll need to pay for “all scheduled servicing, maintenance & tyres of the vehicle”. These maintenance plans don’t cover accident damage, missing items, vandalism, windscreen damage, or misfuelling.

The vehicle inspection happens against BVRLA Fair Wear and Tear standards at the end of your contract. Damage beyond these guidelines means extra charges. Each funder has their own specific guidelines. Get these standards in writing when you finalise your Toyota Proace van lease agreement.

## Where You Save: Real-World Lease Benefits

A Toyota Proace lease offers big savings that offset many original costs beyond the monthly payments. The true value of your investment becomes clear when you look at these benefits over the lease term.

### Fuel Efficiency vs Competitors

The Toyota Proace City stands out with its great fuel economy compared to other commercial vehicles. The diesel variants show excellent efficiency. BlueHDi 75 claims 45.6-51.4mpg while BlueHDi 100 delivers 46.1-52.3mpg. These numbers are impressive, but real-life testing shows even better results. Drivers keep getting over 50mpg in typical use. The 100hp engine can reach beyond 60mpg on long motorway trips.

These efficiency numbers rank among the best you’ll find in the compact van segment. The diesel engines meet Euro 6 emissions standards. This means you won’t face additional charges in most urban environmental zones throughout the UK.

### Electric Model: Tax and ULEZ Savings

The Proace City Electric lease gives you huge financial advantages. The Office of Zero Emission Vehicles offers a £2,500 grant that cuts down your original costs. On top of that, electric models don’t need road tax until 2025, which saves you money each year.

Business owners operating in urban centres will love this part – the electric variant doesn’t need to pay Ultra Low Emission Zone charges. This saves up to £12.50 daily in London alone. Company car drivers benefit too. Benefit in Kind rates stay at just 2% until April 2025 and only go up by 1% yearly until 2028.

### Standard Equipment That Cuts Extra Costs

The Proace City comes loaded with features even in simple specifications, so you won’t need costly upgrades:

-   Every model has a 10-inch infotainment system, smartphone connectivity and digital instruments
-   Air conditioning, rear parking sensors and cruise control come with all variants
-   Toyota Safety Sense with Pre-Collision System, Automatic High Beam and Road Sign Assist give you premium safety features

Toyota’s aftercare package might be the best value of all. Each new Proace City comes with a 3-year manufacturer warranty plus 12 months/10,000 miles extra warranty with qualifying service. Commercial vehicles also get 5 years of free roadside assistance. This means you won’t pay for breakdown coverage during most lease agreements.

## Best Toyota Proace Lease Deals in 2025

Toyota Proace lease prices show many competitive options in the UK market. Monthly payments start at just £235.24+VAT for a simple model. These versatile vans provide excellent value compared to outright purchase.

### Top Business Lease Offers by Term Length

Business owners looking for shorter commitments will find competitive rates with 36-month terms. The standard Proace L1 diesel with 1.5D 100 Active specification costs £239.71+VAT monthly with an £2,876.52 rental payment. Lower monthly payments come with 48-month agreements, where the same model costs £235.24+VAT with £2,822.88 rental payment.

Electric variants cost more monthly but reduce running costs substantially. The Proace L1 Electric Icon with 50kWh battery starts at £307.16+VAT monthly and qualifies for the £2,500 OZEV grant. Medium wheelbase diesel models start from £349.93+VAT, while long wheelbase versions begin at £376.31+VAT.

Mileage allowances shape the pricing structure. Most advertised rates assume 5,000-8,000 annual miles. A 10,000-mile allowance adds about £6 to typical monthly contracts.

### Which Toyota Proace Lease Deal Offers Best Value?

Your specific business needs determine the best value option. The L1 Electric Icon makes economic sense for urban operations. It qualifies for ULEZ exemptions, comes with a £2,500 government grant, and includes free Toyota HomeCharge installation. These benefits offset the higher monthly payments.

The diesel-powered Icon grade in medium length provides the best balance between capacity and cost for businesses with varying load needs. Toyota currently offers an 8.9% APR representative deal with £1,000 deposit contribution on select models until 30th June 2025.

Remember that advertised prices exclude VAT and usually include processing fees around £224.99. Most configurations take 3-6 months for delivery.

## Conclusion

My deep dive into Toyota Proace City leasing shows this compact van delivers great value, even with its higher upfront costs. The van really shines when it comes to balancing capability and efficiency. This becomes clear especially when you have diesel models getting over 50 mpg, while electric versions help you save big on ULEZ charges.

You just need to watch out for some costs that aren’t obvious right away. The upfront rentals can hit £5,122.92+VAT, and going over your mileage limit costs 15p per mile. But here’s the good news – you get plenty of standard features. The 10-inch infotainment system and complete safety package help avoid many typical commercial vehicle upgrades.

The Icon grade in medium length stands out as the best choice for most businesses in 2025’s lease market. Electric models start at £307.16+VAT monthly – that’s higher than diesel versions. But they make sense for city operations because of lower running costs and ULEZ exemptions.

Your choice ended up depending on what your business needs. Diesel models give you better payload and range. Electric versions save you money over time through tax benefits and cheaper operating costs. Whatever option you pick, Toyota’s solid 3-year warranty and 5-year roadside assistance package keep you covered throughout your lease.

## FAQs

**Q1. How long can I expect a Toyota Proace City to last?** The lifespan of a Toyota Proace City depends on various factors such as regular maintenance, driving habits, and operating conditions. With proper care and adherence to manufacturer recommendations, these vans can provide reliable service for many years, potentially lasting well over 100,000 miles.

**Q2. Is the Toyota Proace City a good choice for businesses?** Yes, the Toyota Proace City is a solid choice for businesses, particularly those operating in urban environments. It offers a good balance of fuel efficiency, load capacity, and standard features. The van comes with various configurations to suit different business needs, including short and long wheelbase options and electric variants for eco-conscious operations.

**Q3. What is the fuel efficiency of the Toyota Proace City?** The Toyota Proace City offers impressive fuel efficiency, especially in its diesel variants. Drivers can expect to achieve over 50 mpg in typical use, with some models potentially reaching beyond 60 mpg during long motorway journeys. The official figures range from 45.6 to 52.3 mpg, depending on the specific engine variant.

**Q4. Are there any significant cost savings with the electric Toyota Proace City?** Yes, the electric Toyota Proace City offers substantial cost savings. It qualifies for a £2,500 government grant, enjoys zero road tax until 2025, and is exempt from Ultra Low Emission Zone charges. Additionally, it benefits from lower running costs and reduced company car tax rates, making it an economical choice for businesses operating in urban areas.

**Q5. What are the key features included in a standard Toyota Proace City lease?** A standard Toyota Proace City lease includes several valuable features. All models come with a 10-inch infotainment system, smartphone connectivity, digital instruments, air conditioning, and rear parking sensors. Safety features like Toyota Safety Sense with Pre-Collision System are also standard. Additionally, every new Proace City includes a 3-year manufacturer warranty and 5 years of free roadside assistance for commercial vehicles.
